message.content:
@startuml

class Game {
  -clock_t start
  -clock_t end
  -int curLevel
  -{const}int MAX_LEVEL
  -bool isFinish
  -bool isQuit
  -Session* curSession
  --
  -handleCmd(char)
  -handleStartCmd(char)
  -initSession()
  -startSession()
  -endSession()
  +start()
  +isFinish()
  +getDuration()
}

class Session {
  -level
  -map
  -step
  -isFinish
  --
  +move(Direction)
  +getMap()
  +finish()
  +isFinish()
  +getLevel()
  +backToPreviousPlace()
  +restart()
}

class MapRepository {
  +MAP_PATH:string
  +MAP_DIR:string
  +MAP_ID:enum
  +MapBuffer:class
  --
  +getMap(MAP_ID)
}

interface Viewer {
  +getInput()
  +getLevel()
  +display()
}

enum State {
  FLOOR_OUT_SIDE,WALL,FLOOR,BOX,TARGET,PLAYER,BOX_ON_TARGET
}

enum TileType {
  WALL,FLOOR,TARGET
}

enum TileFlag {
  NULL,PLAYER,BOX
}

enum Diractory {
  UP,DOWN,LEFT,RIGHT,SITU
}

class Map {
  -width:int
  -height:int
  -tiles:TileMap
  -MovableList:vector
  -player:Player
  -Tile:OUT_SIDE_TILE
  --
  -getTile()
  -moveBox()
  +getWidth()
  +getHeight()
  +initMap(const string&)
  +getStateOf(const Position&)
  +getBoxs()
  +getPlayerPosition()
  +back()
}

class Rule {
  +isWin(const Map&)
  +isRightMove(const Map&,Direction)
}

class FileUtil {
  +readFile()
}

class Tile {
  -position:Position
  -type:TileType
  -flag:TileFlag
  --
  +setPosition(const Position&)
  +getPosition()
  +setFlag(TileFlag)
  +getType()
  +getState()
}

class Position {
  -x:int
  -y:int
  +DIRS
  --
  +operator==(const Position&)
  +opeartor+=(const Position&)
  +getX()
  +getY()
  +of(int,int)
}

class Player {
  +move(Direction)
  +getPreviousDirection()
  +getPreviousPushFlag()
  +clear()
}

class Box {
  -onTarget:bool
  --
  +moveToTile(TileType)
  +getOnTarget()
}

class Moveable {
  -position:Position
  -state:
  --
  +{virtual}move(Direction)
  +back(Direction)
  +getPosition()
  +setPosition(const Position&)
}

Game --> Session
Game --> MapRepository
Game --> Viewer
Session --> Map
Session --> Rule
MapRepository --> FileUtil
Map *-- Tile
Map *-- Player
Map *-- Box
Tile *-- Position
Player --|> Moveable
Box --|> Moveable
Moveable --> Position

@enduml
